things.name: Running of the Bulls (San Fermin Festival)
things.description: The world's most famous bull run held every July during the San Fermin festival; the 800m course from the corrals to the bullring has been run since 1592

things.name: Pamplona City Walls
things.description: Magnificent star-shaped Renaissance fortifications encircling the old town; one of the best-preserved military fortification systems in Europe

things.name: Pamplona Cathedral
things.description: Gothic cathedral begun in 1387 with twin Baroque towers and an extraordinary 15th-century alabaster royal tomb; peaceful Gothic cloister of great beauty

things.name: Museum of Navarra
things.description: Outstanding regional museum in a former 16th-century hospital with collections of Roman mosaics, medieval art and Goya portraits of striking quality

things.name: Plaza del Castillo
things.description: Pamplona's grand central square with elegant cafes where Ernest Hemingway drank while writing The Sun Also Rises; the social heart of the city

things.name: Citadel (Ciudadela)
things.description: Philip II's star-shaped Renaissance citadel from 1571, now a public park; one of Spain's best-preserved examples of 16th-century military architecture

things.name: University of Navarra Museum
things.description: Extraordinary private university art museum with works by Picasso, Miro, Chillida and major 20th-century Spanish artists in a purpose-built modern building

things.name: Taconera Park
things.description: Beautiful 19th-century public park adjacent to the city walls with a moat housing deer, ducks and peacocks; one of Spain's most charming urban parks

things.name: Hemingway Route
things.description: Walk in the footsteps of Hemingway through the bars, cafes and squares he immortalised in The Sun Also Rises; a self-guided literary tour of old Pamplona

things.name: El Sadar Stadium
things.description: Home of CA Osasuna with 23,576 capacity; the club has participated in the UEFA Europa League and is known for its passionate red-and-blue Navarre support
